data.content:
# MindX Documentation Index

## Comprehensive Documentation Index

This document provides a complete index of all documentation in the mindX system, organized by category and component type.

**Last Updated**: 2026-04-27
**Total Documentation Files**: 194+
**CORE Documentation**: Complete 15-component analysis ✅
**Agent Documentation**: 34+
**Tool Documentation**: 29+
**DAIO Documentation**: 15 files covering 12 core + modular contracts ✅
**Production Ready**: ✅ Enterprise-grade deployment and security documentation complete  

---

## 🆕 Recent additions (2026-05-13)

- **[HERMES_INTEGRATION.md](HERMES_INTEGRATION.md)** (NEW · 2026-05-13, Day-1 shipped) — first concrete absorption from the Hermes / OpenClaw research stack. `agents/skills/` ships the **SKILL.md** procedural-memory format (Hermes-compatible YAML frontmatter + Markdown body, plus the mindX BDI additions `intention_template` / `preconditions` / `postconditions`) over a `SkillStore` that runs every skill through a **screen-before-persist scanner** with five finding classes (`prompt_injection`, `destructive_command`, `data_exfiltration`, `size`, `missing_required`). Direct architectural answer to the **OpenClaw ClawHub-malware vector** (Koi Security 2026: 341 malicious entries in 2,857 ClawHub skills = 12 % rate, Lakera 2026: prompt-injection vectors in 4,310 audited skills) and the **Hermes ALLOW-ALL-defaults gap** (community audit: 4 Critical + 9 High in default config). Day-1 policy: DENY-ALL on any scanner block; warnings refused unless operator authors `created_by="human"` AND `pinned=true`. Curator-class actors (the deferred MASTERMIND-scheduled cleanup job) can archive — never delete — and cannot touch human-authored or pinned skills. 15 tests pass CPU-only.
- **[Hermes Agent Integration Patterns for mindX](operations/Hermes%20Agent%20Integration%20Patterns%20for%20mindX_%20Self-Improving%20Architecture%20Analysismd)** (NEW research · 2026-05-13) — 494-line companion to the OpenClaw report. Decomposes Hermes v0.13.0 "Tenacity" (released 2026-05-07; 864 commits, 588 PRs, 295 contributors; overtook OpenClaw on OpenRouter daily token volume 224 B vs 186 B as of 2026-05-10 — first market signal that "session-native" architecture is a ceiling). Maps four importable primitives onto mindX without touching model weights: (1) skill-distillation loop, (2) bounded markdown + SQLite-FTS5 + pluggable dialectic memory stack, (3) Kanban heartbeat/zombie/hallucination-gate runtime, (4) DSPy + GEPA evolutionary optimizer. Ranked recommendations table at §10. Cross-attribution with the [OpenClaw research](operations/openclaw_mindx_research.md) below.
- **[openclaw_mindx_research.md](operations/openclaw_mindx_research.md)** (NEW research · 2026-05-12) — 280-line OpenClaw + OpenClaw-RL architectural decomposition for mindX integration. **Five highest-leverage transfers**: SKILL.md format (now shipped), pluggable Context Engine pattern (v2026.3.7+ lossless-claw flagship), **hybrid vector+BM25 (70/30) Active Memory** over SQLite + sqlite-vec, plugin manifest-first validation with capability typing, and **OpenClaw-RL** (slime + SGLang + Megatron, Qwen3.5/3.6-aligned — direct upstream for mindXtrain v3.6). Security history dossier: ClawJacked CVE (Gateway loopback exemption brute-force), Koi Security audit (341 malicious skills), Lakera audit (prompt-injection in 4,310 skills), Anthropic April 2026 detection routing OpenClaw users to higher billing tier (50× cost increase, "do not bind mindX to any single LLM-provider's flat-rate subscription"). Pre-mainnet safety stack: signed skill manifests via BANKON `bankon.eth` subnames, BONAFIDE Tessera on-chain provenance, capability-declared permissions, Unicode steganography detection (zero-width / RTL overrides), static prompt-injection scanning (shipped), Podman sandbox, trust-tier display on AgenticPlace (verified-publisher / community / unscanned).

## 🆕 Recent additions (2026-05-02)

- **[X402.md](X402.md)** (NEW · 2026-05-02) — canonical doc for HTTP 402 micropayments on Algorand. Covers (1) the [x402.org](https://x402.org) spec, (2) Algorand DevRel's just-released [`@x402-avm/*`](https://github.com/algorand-devrel/x402-demo) v^2.6.1 packages (ISC, alpha, TestNet-only, hosted facilitator at `x402.goplausible.xyz`), (3) mindX's pre-standard adoption (EVM-only Base USDC + Tempo MPP via EIP-3009), (4) the **triple-rail convergence** plan (Base + Tempo + Algorand ASA in one `accepts[]` envelope), (5) wire format, (6) operator runbook + four BANKON Vault keys (`algorand_mnemonic`, `algorand_recipient_address`, `algorand_usdc_asa_id`, `x402_avm_facilitator_url`), (7) limitations & roadmap (the deferred `recordAvmReceipt()` extension to `BankonPaymentRouter.sol` for L1 audit parity). New code: [`tools/x402_avm_client.py`](../tools/x402_avm_client.py) (pure Python via `py-algorand-sdk`, mirrors `keeperhub_x402_client.py`), [`AgenticPlace/api/x402_avm.ts`](../AgenticPlace/api/x402_avm.ts) (wraps `@x402-avm/{fetch,hono,avm,
key_points: MindX Agent is the meta-agent that understands all agents
Serves as execution mind of the Gödel machine
Orchestrates self-improvement through SEA, BDI, Mastermind
Maintains comprehensive knowledge of all agents
